prs.title: Feature/collector field progress
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: Touches 45+ files implementing a collector field progress system with abstract base classes and 20+ individual collector implementations, representing a significant feature build-out across the AI/data layer.

prs.title: Ch/slide deck
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 895 lines across 59 files covering a full public-facing UI overhaul including login, onboarding flow, registration, password reset, and multiple multi-step components — a major frontend feature spanning layout, schemas, and pages.

prs.title: Staging
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 2445 lines across 59 files from a merge/integration PR combining agent enhancements, multiple calculators, UI integration of chat window and field sidebar, schema changes, and substantial documentation — architectural scope with contributions from two authors.

prs.title: 🚀 AI Agent Chat Window & Real-Time Field Progress Tracking
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 1403 custom lines across 38 files implementing an AI agent chat window, real-time field progress tracking, new Prisma schema changes, server actions, API routes, and supporting UI — a major cross-cutting feature touching the full stack.

stories.name: AI-Powered Field Progress Tracking & Agent Chat Experience
stories.rationale: Together these PRs deliver the end-to-end AI agent chat interface and real-time field progress tracking, giving users intelligent, live feedback as they complete their business readiness data.

stories.name: Staging Environment Deployment
stories.rationale: Establishes a dedicated staging environment to support safer testing and validation of new features before production release.

stories.name: Slide Deck Presentation Feature
stories.rationale: Introduces a slide deck UI experience, enabling users to view or present their business readiness information in a structured, presentation-ready format.
